This method creates a deck of resource cards (id from 1 to 40) In order: suit of the card, the four corners (starting from upright) and the points

RmiClientToServer - Class in Network.Client.RMI
This class is the RMI implementation of the client to server communication.
RmiClientToServer(VirtualServer) - Constructor for class Network.Client.RMI.RmiClientToServer
Constructor of the class Create a new thread that call the ClientToServerCall method that is used to read the messages from the queue and send them to the server

This method is used to run the server

This method is used to run the virtual view It reads the messages from the input stream and handles them
